query: SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, ta.acquisitionManagerId, tm1.name as leadManagerName, tm1.teamRole as leadManagerRole, tm2.name as acqManagerName, tm2.teamRole as acqManagerRole FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT ta.id, ta.leadManagerId, ta.acquisitionManagerId, tm1.name as leadManagerName, tm1.teamRole as leadManagerRole, tm2.name as acqManagerName, tm2.teamRole as acqManagerRole FROM team_assignments ta LEFT JOIN team_members tm1 ON ta.leadManagerId = tm1.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm2 ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = tm2.id;
